title: Color Register Athlete Or Performer
sourceTitle: Color Register Midjourney Prompt Athlete Or Performer
prompt: [ATHLETE OR PERFORMER] in [PEAK ACTION POSE] rendered as a halftone-grain duotone figure on aged cream ground, overlaid by [NUMBER] bold vertical color band columns — [COLOR1], [COLOR2], [COLOR3] — each acting as a transparent Risograph ink layer through which the figure reads differently: silhouette in one, halftone detail in another, near-washed in the third. Slight misregistration between layers. Scratch marks, print grain, ink bleed at band edges. Constructivist sports poster meets Risograph print process. --v 8.1
